form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation 9 of 13 runners at this track November 1 over 4828m, 41 len behind Battle Of Mirbat carrying 75.5kg at $15. First up last campaign 10 of 15 starters at Cork April 20 over 3822m, slow track; 23 len behind Krak carrying 71kg at $17. This looks tough and place appears best.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Last outing won by a head Fairyhouse on April 4 over 4224m defeating Vaureal with 62.5kg at $17 in a steeplechase.
